name: Tink Mallek
sd_appearance: gnome-sized frame, wiry and compact, standing just over two feet tall, ash-gray skin etched with soot-streaked scars, coal-black hair tangled into a grease-smeared topknot, tawny eyes sharp and restless, pupils dilated as if tracking unseen movement, patchwork leather armor reinforced with brass plates, scavenged scale mail peeking through frayed seams, warhammer with a cracked obsidian head rests at their hip, crossbow slung across their back with a coiled serpent grip, a jagged ash-mark tattoo crawls across their left cheek, fading into the brass plating.
faction_visual: ash grey chainmail or plate, Warden badge, ash-mark on left cheek if officer
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
